taxonomy: Abrodictyum angustimarginatum is a species within the plant family of Polypodiaceae, and it belongs to the genus Abrodictyum. This epiphytic fern is native to Africa, specifically in countries such as Cameroon, the Republic of the Congo, and the Democratic Republic of the Congo. The plant's classification has been recognized under the APG III system, which groups plants based on their evolutionary relationships. As a member of the Polypodiaceae family, it is closely related to other genera like Platycerium and Polypodium. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
